text: Last month we chose the most reliable supplier.
Now I want to review the quarter and plan the next one.

Last quarter we achieved our goal.
Supplier B is more reliable than Supplier A.
Next quarter we are going to improve our reports.
I think the result will be even better.
Hi Percival. How was the quarter? Did the team make good progress?
Yes. We finished the audit on time and we achieved our main goal. Overall, the result was very good.
Great. And which supplier do you recommend for next quarter?
I recommend Supplier B. It is more reliable than the others. Next quarter we are going to improve our response time too.
Good plan. Thank you for the clear feedback. Are you confident about the new project?
Yes, very confident. I think the result will be even better next quarter.
Last quarter we achieved our main goal.
Overall, the result was very good.
I recommend the most reliable option.
I am confident the result will be even better.

Hi, this is Percival. Let me review our last quarter for the risk team. First, we finished the safety audit on time. Then we compared three suppliers, and we chose the most reliable one. Overall, the team made very good progress, and we achieved our main goal. The result was positive. Next quarter, we are going to improve our response time, and we are going to launch a new safety project. I am confident the result will be even better. Thank you to the whole team for your hard work and your feedback.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. Here is my feedback on the quarter. The team made great progress, and the audit result was the best in two years. I think we can improve our reports a little, but overall it was a strong quarter. For next quarter, I recommend two things. First, we are going to hire one more analyst. Second, we are going to compare new software options. I am confident we will achieve our goals. Talk to you at the review meeting.

First, Percival is going to open the review meeting. Then, he is going to report what the team achieved last quarter. After that, he is going to recommend the best supplier. Later, he is going to present the plan to improve next quarter. Finally, he is going to thank the team for their feedback.
